message:
test(mermaid): add 18 edge bundling tests for layout and renderer

Add comprehensive tests for the smart edge bundling feature:
- Layout: disabled config, single edge, threshold, opposite direction,
  different arrows, preserving non-parallel, canonical index, LR offset,
  min_count clamp, sorted members, self-loops, non-graph skip, multi-group
- Renderer: bundle_count_label (none/unicode/ascii), thick line style,
  label appended to existing edge label

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
